creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jochen,

hope you're doing well.

As the workaround I'd suggest to download new http_redis third-party                                           
module tarball from next URL:                                                                                  
http://people.freebsd.org/~osa/ngx_http_redis-0.3.9.tar.gz                                                     
and put into /usr/ports/distfiles directory.                                                                   
                                                                                                               
Hope it'll be available on LOCAL/osa distribution point soon.

Apologies for any inconvenience.
